games.title: 101 Starships
games.author: Zoglu
games.description: Can you destroy this huge fleet and survive? A difficult shoot 'em up with interesting scoring mechanics. (This game was adapted using the Gamebuino Library for Arduboy by akkera102)

games.author: Mike Meyer (mwm)
games.description: A 1010 block puzzle game

games.author: Simon Holmes (filmote)
games.description: A version of the classic WWII game 1943: The Battle of Midway. Destroy the enemy Zeroes and Bombers. Zeros with solid wings will die on one shot, others will take multiple hits before they die. Watch your fuel, your health and ammunition - replenish these by running over the power ups!

games.author: Press Play On Tape (Filmote and Vampirics)
games.description: A version of the classic WWII game 1943: The Battle of Midway. Destroy the enemy Zeroes and Bombers. Zeros with solid wings will die on one shot, others will take multiple hits before they die. Watch your fuel, your health and ammunition - replenish these by running over the power ups!

games.title: 1nvader
games.author: Press Play on Tape, Filmote and Vampirics
games.description: A one-button classic.

games.author: Yuki
games.description: 2048 Clone

games.title: 2PlayersPack
games.author: Cedric Martin
games.description: 5 in 1 Game designed for 2 players

games.title: 3in1B
games.author: Daniel Champagne (Électro L.I.B)
games.description: 3 games in 1 ( tiny bomber - tiny arkanoid - tiny gilbert )

games.title: 3in1C
games.author: Daniel C (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: 3 games in 1 (tiny Bert-tiny Bike-tiny Trick)

games.title: 3in1D
games.author: Daniel C (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: 3 games in 1 (Tiny Ddug-Tiny Plaque-Tiny Tris v2)

games.title: 3in1E
games.author: Daniel C (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: (Tiny-Missile - Tiny-Morpion - Tiny-Pipe)

games.title: 3in1F
games.author: Daniel C (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: 3in1F TinySquest TinyDoc TinyArena

games.title: ABAsm DP1
games.author: fuopy
games.description: ABasm is an Arduboy game that lets you program your own Arduboy games, on your Arduboy! It uses an assembly language-style of programming with its own bytecode format.

games.title: Abshell
games.author: boochow
games.description: Abshell is a command shell for Arduboy. You can send commands from PC to Arduboy via USB-serial port. No programming skills needed to draw graphics on Arduboy screen !

games.title: abSynth FM
games.author: boochow
games.description: FM Synthesizer with step sequencer

games.title: APara
games.author: leovt
games.description: Catch the poor paratroopers before they fall into the shark infested sea.

games.title: Arcodia
games.author: Mike McRoberts (TheArduinoGuy)
games.description: A port of the classic ZX Spectrum game 'Arcadia'.

games.title: Ard-Drivin
games.author: Rem and LP
games.description: a little racing game for the good old arduboy.

games.title: ARDecipher
games.author: databhor
games.description: Similar to the terminal hack in Fallout 4. Find the password within 5 retries. Number of matched characters will be shown if you choose a non-password string.

games.title: Ardletics
games.author: Ignacio Viña (igvina)
games.description: Athletics game for Arduboy. At the moment I have a playable proof of concept of what would be the basis of the game (including smooth animations and digitized sound).

games.title: Ardu Buggy
games.author: NonoNano
games.description: Ardu Buggy, inspired by Moon Patrol.

games.title: Ardu Turf Masters
games.author: Fernando Jerez (ferjerez)
games.description: A golf game.

games.title: Ardu-EZ Button
games.author: shiyouganai
games.description: The Ardu-EZ button is the perfect way to relish your daily successes! Just one press and you'll be greeted with a satisfying reminder of the ease with which you dispatch even the most pesky problems. A "Most Useless" entry to Game Jam 4.

games.title: Ardu-man
games.author: Seth Robinson
games.description: Re-live the nostalgic glory of games like Pac-Man and Lock 'n' Chase (with a few less pixels...) right on your Arduboy!

games.title: Ardu-Racer
games.author: tonym128
games.description: A Time Racing Trial Game for Arduboy

games.title: Ardu-Whack
games.author: zeduckmaster
games.description: Whack them all to make the highest score!

games.title: ArduBall
games.author: 2BarrelShotgun
games.description: sort of 1 v 1 basketball game between you and the cpu that is fairly difficult.

games.title: Arduboy Assistant
games.author: crait
games.description: Arduboy Assistant allows you to view raw EEPROM data, back it up through the Arduino IDE's serial monitor, restore EEPROM data the same way, and even clear the entirety of the EEPROM data. Additionally, you can also test buttons, LED's, speaker, serial port, and screen.

games.title: Arduboy Calendar
games.author: hartmann1301
games.description: You can go through all the dates but saving the notes to the eeprom is not implemented correctly

games.title: Arduboy Gamepad
games.author: fuopy
games.description: Maps Arduboy buttons to keyboard keys

games.title: Arduboy Says
games.author: Slade1972
games.description: The game is simple. Remember and repeat the sequences as they show on screen. There are twenty levels generated randomly, so the game should be replayable. The random generation isn't quite working perfectly, sometimes sequences repeat through the same levels (ie, level 1 is almost always Left then Right).

games.title: Arduboy Sprite Editor
games.author: Paul Wasson
games.description: ASE - a sprite editor for Arduboy games that runs on the Arduboy.

games.title: ArduboyLife
games.author: Scott Allen (MLXXXp)
games.description: Conway's Life, a cellular automaton, for the Arduboy

games.title: ArduBOYNG
games.author: Troubadixx
games.description: a simple PONG inspired game by an Arduboy noob

games.title: ArduBrain
games.author: renato-grottesi
games.description: ArduBrain is an application that helps you keeping your brain sharp training your reflexes, memory, focus and much more!

games.title: ARDUBULLETs
games.author: obono
games.description: Avoid voluminous bullets and defeat enemy squadron in one minute.

games.title: ArduCC
games.author: Vincentius Madya
games.description: Change your credit card sized gaming system into a real credit card

games.title: Arducross
games.author: David (oldmouse123)
games.description: Very simple, very early Picross clone. Currently has 16 boards, some of which are from Mario's Picross for the Gameboy.

games.title: ArduIndy
games.author: JacosteCode
games.description: Inspired by ZX Spectrum game 'Sabre Wulf'. An action game where you shall find 4 keys in the dungeons. After finding the 4 keys, the door to freedom opens. Beware of the skull monster, you can only kill it if you have found potion. From version 2.5 it is possible to save progress in the game and start again from where you were later on.

games.title: Ardulem
games.author: banban
games.description: Ardulem is an attempt to bring the legendary "Lemmings" game to the Arduboy platform

games.title: ArduLO
games.author: Jon Thysell
games.description: ArduLO is a clone of the puzzle game Lights Out for the Arduboy.

games.title: Arduloop
games.author: possan
games.description: A little chiptune step sequencer

games.title: Ardumania
games.author: Daniel C (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: Ardumania V1.3

games.title: ArduMetronome
games.author: raspberrybrain
games.description: A simple metronome

games.title: Arduminer
games.author: Bergasms
games.description: Mining, crafting and combat on your arduboy. Explore 64 procedurally generated levels, conquer dungeons and upgrade your kit to survive progressively stronger enemies.

games.title: ArduRemote
games.author: eried
games.description: Virtual mouse and keyboard for Arduboy

games.title: ArduSaver
games.author: Bert Veer
games.description: Do you feel your OLED is suffering from critical levels of burn-in? Is nostalgia spoiling your working day? ArduSaver to the rescue!

games.title: Arduslide
games.author: gooberdlx
games.description: simple tile slide game

games.title: Ardusweeper
games.author: Julien Bellue
games.description: A simple minesweeper for arduboy

games.title: Ardutosh
games.author: James Howard
games.description: Ardutosh is an OS/desktop environment for the Arduboy made for the Arduboy game jam 4 (theme: not a game)

games.title: Ardynia
games.author: city41
games.description: An adventure game in the style of Zelda

games.title: Armageddon
games.author: wuuff
games.description: You have been tasked with the defense of six cities from the incoming nuclear apocalypse. You have only two launchers to shoot down incoming missiles. Survive as long as you can to delay the inevitable end of the world. (This game was adapted using the Gamebuino Library for Arduboy by akkera102)

games.title: ARtillery
games.author: bergasms
games.description: An Arduboy game inspired by Amiga Tanx by Gary Roberts.

games.title: ASTEROIDS
games.author: CDR_Xavier
games.description: The unique 2D space shooter. Ammo in the bottomless box.

games.title: Atomic Puzzle Pack
games.author: atomic-salamander
games.description: Atomic Puzzle Pack 3-in-1 game for Arduboy

games.title: Back to the Jungle
games.author: eried
games.description: The Zoo had to close, what can the animals do? Entry game for the first Arduboy Game Jam.

games.title: Bang! Bang!
games.author: RackhamLeNoir
games.description: GameBuino implementation of the Bang! Bang! game. (This game was adapted using the Gamebuino Library for Arduboy by akkera102)

games.title: Bangi
games.author: Ignacio Viña (igvina)
games.description: Destroy all the balloons - 45 challenging levels

games.title: Battle For Zuthsrah
games.author: Mre64
games.description: 8 bit space shooter designed for Arduboy gaming system

games.title: Beam 'Em Up
games.author: unwiredben
games.description: Pilot your squid ship over a pastoral landscape, trying to bring all the cows together while dodging meteors. It's like herding cats, but with cows.

games.title: Biddy Watering
games.author: MyNamesQi
games.description: A simple game of a biddy who waters flowers and dodges a piggy

games.title: BigBlackBox
games.author: STUDIOCRAFTapps
games.description: A awesome platformer for an awesome console! With the gameplay style of SuperMeatBoy, BigBlackBox is a fun platformer full a challenging level desing with a beautiful and handsome look! (This game was adapted using the Gamebuino Library for Arduboy by akkera102)

games.title: BiriBiriBeat
games.author: shiyouganai
games.description: BiriBiriBeat is a miniature rhythm game experience in a microscopic 28KB package. Join your robotic guide Navi and groove together to square wave sounds as you tap your way to the top of the scoreboard!

games.title: Blocks
games.author: w3woody
games.description: Move boxes around until they're where they belong.

games.title: Boids
games.author: elpassion
games.description: Flocking behavior simulator, depicting flocking birds, shoaling fish or swarming bees

games.title: Bombzzle
games.author: HokuHakase
games.description: Bombzzle is a puzzle game where you must blow up chains of similar blocks to get points! Every 10 seconds, a bomb appears along with a tile marked as BONUS (+) and another as PENALTY (-). Bonus tiles worth 1 point while penalty tiles make you lose 1 point per level! Every 50 points, you level up.

games.title: Book Reader - The Pig and the Box
games.author: drummyfish
games.description: portable book reader

games.title: Boris goes skiing
games.author: Tom Sparrow (sones857)
games.description: A clone of the ZX Spectrum game Horace goes skiing for the Arduboy

games.title: Bounce
games.author: RetrobitCoder
games.description: 2 Player Game. A paddle and ball game in the vein on Atari's Pong. Two dogs are trying to hit the ball back and forth without the ball going past them. If the ball does go past them, that is a point for the other dog. The dog with the highest score when the player(s) stop, wins.

games.title: Box Stacker
games.author: dragula96
games.description: Stacker clone like the game at the arcade that gives you a chance to win a prize, however in this one the only thing you win is satisfaction!.

games.title: Brainfuck interpreter
games.author: red-hara
games.description: Arduboy Brainfuck interpreter. Current version has 512 characters of program memory, 256 characters of data memory, 40 characters of input and 40 characters of output with NO overflow check. Standard version is shipped with Hello World demo program

games.title: Breakout-V
games.author: boochow
games.description: Simple vertical screen version of Breakout for Arduboy.

games.title: BurgardTime
games.author: pixelplatforms
games.description: Just a little homage to the classic BurgerTime.

games.title: Cascade Path
games.author: arduboychris
games.description: Have you ever wanted to discover what life was like on the trail? Going hunting and fording rivers? Have you ever wanted to know more about Dysentery than you could possibly imagine?

games.title: CastleBoy
games.author: jlauener
games.description: Castlevania-like game for the Arduboy.

games.title: Catacombs of the damned!
games.author: James Howard
games.description: Escape from the catacomb

games.title: Chicken Launcher
games.author: crait
games.description: Chicken Launcher is a fun lil' game I made based off of Kitten Cannon. Shoot a chicken as far as you can, trying to hit springboards to give you a boost, but watch out for spikes! Your high score is recorded and saved. If you think you get a big high score, tweet me a pic!

games.title: Chie Magari Ita
games.author: obono
games.description: There are 10 different pieces. You must place all of them into the frame without overlapping.

games.title: Chirp
games.author: eried
games.description: Make someone go crazy with your Arduboy. Just hide it, he will briefly chirp every 1 to 15 minutes.

games.title: Choplifter
games.author: Simon Holmes (filmote)
games.description: The classic Choplifter game for the Arduboy!

games.title: Chri-Bocchi Cat
games.author: obono
games.description: Move the cat and bounce gift boxes for 2 minutes.

games.title: Chrome Dino
games.author: flaki
games.description: I've recreated Chrome's (in?)famous dino side-scroller running-man-style dino jumper. It's just a quick hack, certainly unfinished and unoptimized but you might enjoy it.

games.title: Chrome Dino - Halloween
games.author: flaki
games.description: Enjoy this special spooked-up edition of Chrome Dino

games.title: Cistercia
games.author: poevoid
games.description: Cistercian number counter - displays arabic numerals on the left and their cistercian counterparts on the right.

games.title: Coder's Toolbox
games.author: Filmote and Vampirics
games.description: A toolbox of tools for developing ArduboyTones compatible music and Sprites compatible images

games.title: CosmicPods
games.author: cubic9com
games.description: CosmicPods is a tiny shoot-'em-up game for Arduboy. As cosmic squid, shoot octopuses up!

games.title: CowBro
games.author: GERD (Trevor Ancona)
games.description: You are a cowboy and have to shoot randomly generated targets and grab time bonuses that drop from the top of the stage to continue.

games.title: Crabator
games.author: Aurelien Rodot
games.description: Crabator is an intense action game where you kill crabs to make money to buy weapons to kill crabs to make money, etc. but watch out, the more crabs you kill the more they are. (This game was adapted using the Gamebuino Library for Arduboy by akkera102)

games.title: Crate Confusion
games.author: Phoboslab
games.description: Collect fuel, don't hit crates

games.title: Crates 3D
games.author: Badja (original) & Brian (port)
games.description: A port of the TI-83 calculator puzzle game.

games.title: CrazyKart
games.author: Alberto S. Naranjo Galet (Veilkrand)
games.description: Basic game to test capabilities and frameworks

games.title: Cripple Mr Onion!
games.author: fentonc
games.description: It's a like a hilariously complicated combination of poker and blackjack, using an 8-suited deck. You can customize your character, accumulate money through betting, etc. As you gain money, your 'rank' increases, with the ultimate goal of being rich enough to become the Patrician of Ankh-Morpork!

games.title: Cute E
games.author: JuiceLizard
games.description: Quick time event game for the Arduboy, inspired by the singer Els Pynoo and the song "You can sleep in my bed" from Vive la f�te. It was coded by Juice Lizard in 2017.

games.title: CyberHack
games.author: Press Play on Tape, Filmote and Vampirics
games.description: Inspired by the brilliant but flawed CyberPunk.

games.title: DanceRow
games.author: madya121
games.description: An Audition Ayodance clone for Arduboy. With your arrow keypad, match the arrow on the screen. Then, on the correct beat, press (A) / (B) to get a score. Once you beat that beat, you'll get one of these four results based on how close with the correct beat:

games.title: Dark & Under
games.author: Garage Collective (Cyril Guichard (Luxregina), Simon Holmes (Filmote), Pharap)
games.description: Do you have what it takes to survive the depths of the Undermountain? Alone?  If so, then pack your gear, strap on your shield, explore labyrinthine corridors and battle unimaginable foes to steal the greedy Dragon's treasure.

games.title: Deep Dish Nine
games.author: fentonc
games.description: The goal of this game is to fly pizza delivery missions throughout the TRAPPIST-1 system in the alloted time (or the pizza is free!). This game utilizes the n-body simulation I developed for HANS, and actually requires you to use your knowledge of orbital mechanics to match orbits with your destination planet.

games.title: Defenduino
games.author: Alex McChesney
games.description: A clone of the arcade classic Defender for the Arduboy.

games.title: Diamonds
games.author: RedBug
games.description: Diamonds is a mix between a breakout game and a puzzle game. Original game was released on HP48 more than 20 years ago (yes.. Already 20 years...).

games.title: Digger
games.author: Sutchig
games.description: Collect diamonds and avoid/kill monsters (This game was adapted using the Gamebuino Library for Arduboy by akkera102)

games.title: DIGMAN
games.author: Slugslinger
games.description: Fight time, dig away and get rich

games.title: Do You Remember Love
games.author: cobinee
games.description: Do You Remember Love? - a horizontally scrolling shooter

games.title: Dominoes 'All Fives'
games.author: Simon Holmes (filmote) & Stephance C (vampirics)
games.description: All Fives is a popular variant of Dominoes where players the goal of the game is not just to go out, but to make the open ends of the layout add up to 5 (or a multiple of five).

games.title: Egg Master Pro 2020
games.author: Bert Veer
games.description: The Ultimate Egg Timer for Arduboy

games.title: Electronic Quarterback
games.author: DWidel
games.description: Game that emulates the behaviour of the old Electronic Quarterback pocket console by Coleco

games.title: ElsieBoy4
games.author: Joe Lyman
games.description: Turn your Arduboy into an air-gapped LC4 appliance

games.title: Epic Mini Games!
games.author: MicroGames
games.description: This is a compilation of FUN mini games that I hope you will like. (This game was adapted using the Gamebuino Library for Arduboy by akkera102)

games.title: Evade
games.author: Modus Create
games.description: A Space Shooter Game for Arduboy by Modus Create

games.title: Evade 2
games.author: Modus Create
games.description: First first-person Flight simulator for the Arduboy.

games.title: Fanboat
games.author: fanboat (Ritchie)
games.description: The greatest Swamp-Skimmer-Simulator ever conceived, unless you count Half-Life 2. That one's better.

games.title: Farkle
games.author: Filmote and Vampirics
games.description: A version of the classic dice game Farkle - a game of tactics and luck.

games.title: Fatsche
games.author: Michael Gollnick (veritazz)
games.description: defend the door!

games.title: Fidget Spinner
games.author: Tiago Bento (trigonated)
games.description: A very simple fidget spinner simulator for Arduboy, as if there aren't enough fidget spinners already. You can spin the spinner clockwise or counter-clockwise, as well as change the design of the spinner.

games.title: Fire
games.author: Simon Holmes (filmote) and Stephane C (vampirics)
games.description: A version of the classic Game and Watch game, Fire! Save the residents of the burning tower by catching them in your safety net and bouncing them into the awaiting ambulance. Once the ambulance is full, rush them to hospital for treatment.

games.title: Flappy Ball
games.author: Chris Martinez, Scott Allen
games.description: Try to overcome the force of gravity and navigate a levitating ball through small openings.

games.title: Flappy Birdie
games.author: GameExpress
games.description: Press A to make the little birdie fly! Avoid hitting pipes or crashing into the ground. The game gets a little bit harder after reaching 10, 20 and 50 points.

games.title: Flood fill
games.author: garyfranz
games.description: This is a simple flood fill game for the Arduboy. Starting from the top-left tile, the goal is to flood the entire board until there is only one pattern.

games.title: Galaxion
games.author: tako2
games.description: Shooting game for Arduboy. Mission: Destroy aliens

games.title: Game of Life
games.author: kmasato (Masato Kobayashi)
games.description:
This is a 25x25 Game of Life program for Arduboy.

KEYS
A: Game start
B: Put live cell
Direction Keys: Move cell
UP and DOWN: Reset

games.title: Games'n Goblins: The Game!
games.author: Claudio Belato
games.description: This is a clone of a puzzle game named Assembloids. The goal is to assemble pieces of monster faces trying to mix them as little as possible. But you have to hurry, time passes fast!

games.title: German Whist
games.author: Simon Holmes (filmote) & Stephance C (vampirics)
games.description: A version of the card game German Whist.

games.title: Gilbert in the Downland
games.author: Daniel C (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: Gilbert in the Downland is an Arduboy port of the game Downland, originally released on the TRS-80 COCO2 computer!

games.title: Glove
games.author: fuopy
games.description: Glove is an action-adventure game created in the style of the classic Gauntlet series. Navigate from room to room, blasting bad guys and collecting treasure along the way.

games.title: Graph
games.author: TheV360
games.description: A small graphing calculator for Arduboy! Very simple, though. More of a novelty than an actual calculator.

games.title: Graph 2
games.author: V360
games.description: Fully-functional graphing calculator

games.title: Hangman!
games.author: serisman
games.description: Hangman!  Try to guess a word by suggesting letters that may be in the word.  You win if you can guess the word with less than 6 failed letter guesses, otherwise you're dead.

games.title: Harambe's Revenge
games.author: MorganLapis & SerendipityDoDa
games.description: In Harambe's Revenge, you play as a phantasmal Harambe that has returned from the afterlife to convert oblivious tourists into mutant zombie gorilla minions which will then protect him. The zoo had to close down in quarantine, trapping many tourists inside. Harambe's path is a peaceful one so he has no actual attack. His specialty is the HARAMBE DASH - the ability to run faster that a speeding bullet. Press a button and Harambe's speed will temporarily increase. The RGB LED will shine YELLOW while Harambe is using his power. RED means his stamina is regenerating, and GREEN means he is ready to use another HARAMBE DASH.

games.title: Helii
games.author: BHSPitMonkey
games.description: A side-scrolling tunnel game

games.title: Hello, Commander
games.author: Felipe Manga (FManga)
games.description: Turn-Based Strategy game for the Arduboy.

games.title: Hollow Seeker
games.author: OBONO
games.description: Go forward in right direction. Seek a hollow as refuge not to be crushed.

games.title: Hopper
games.author: obono
games.description: There are square panels around you. You must jump on them and go up (foreground side). If you miss the panel and fall toward bottom, the game is over.

games.title: HP35boy
games.author: eried
games.description: HP35 calculator emulator

games.title: Humanity Revenge DC
games.author: giangregorioc
games.description: It's a shoot 'em up quite hard, with 3 ship to choose from (different speed and weapons), 5 enemies with different characteristics, three big bosses, bomb and power-up, highscore and so on.

games.title: IDOUDO
games.author: Rednuht, Comstedt, FManga
games.description: A Simon-like game by Rednuht. The game is opensource, in pure potato-chip assembly, available here: jumpstation.co.uk/dreamcast/idoudo.html (This game was adapted using an adapted version of Marcus Comstedt's SoftVMS emulator for Arduboy by FManga)

games.title: Invaders
games.author: yoda
games.description: Destroy all attacking invaders from space! Now with sound. (This game was adapted using the Gamebuino Library for Arduboy by akkera102)

games.title: Is this? Loss - The Game
games.author: turtleletortue
games.description: A memey game made in 2018 to represent a certain comic as a game

games.title: Jet Pac
games.author: Mike McRoberts
games.description: Arduboy clone of the classic ZX Spectrum game 'Jet Pac'.

games.title: Jezzball
games.author: RackhamLeNoir
games.description: Isolate the bouncing balls (This game was adapted using the Gamebuino Library for Arduboy by akkera102)

games.title: Joustish
games.author: wuuff
games.description: Joustish is a game that is very similar to the arcade classic Joust, but with some minor differences.  Flap around on your bird like crazy as you attempt to unseat the enemy bird riders! Hit an enemy when you are higher than them and they will be separated from their bird as a harmless egg. Don’t leave eggs lying around, though, or a new enemy will eventually spring from it!

games.title: JumpBoy
games.author: t-iwasaki
games.description: Please twenty taken the coin. Floorboards will continue to decrease one by one each time you jump.

games.title: Juno First
games.author: Stephane C (vampirics) and Simon Holmes (filmote)
games.description: A version of the classic Atari game Juno First.  Kill each wave of attacking aliens before you fuel or health runs out. Rescue the captured astronaut to get extra points! Monitor your fuel, health and score using the scoreboard on the right of the playing field.

games.title: Karateka
games.author: Simon Holmes (filmote)
games.description: Karateka is a 1984 martial arts action game by Jordan Mechner, and was his first published game, created while attending Yale University. It was originally programmed for the Apple II, then widely ported to other platforms.

games.title: Kemono Patrol
games.author: metalidol (misaki)
games.description: You guide a battle bus over ditches, shoot away debris and enemies while your Japanese speaking assistant gives you tips.

games.title: KeyKat - I.T.
games.author: pngwen
games.description: KeyKat-I.T. Is a game where you are an I.T. worker named KeyKat. She has to run around and turn computers off and back on again when they fail. It�s a fairly simple whack-a-mole type game which I wrote over a period of two weeks.

games.title: Knight Move
games.author: obono
games.description: This is an action-puzzle game. You control a knight piece of the chess which can move in an L shape on the 8×4 board.

games.title: Kong
games.author: Press Play On Tape (Filmote and Vampirics)
games.description: A remake of the classic Game and Watch game Donkey Kong

games.title: Kong II
games.author: Press Play on Tapes (Vampirics and Filmote)
games.description: A remake of the classic Game and Watch game Donkey Kong II

games.title: Kooky Kookies
games.author: shdwwzrd
games.description: Santa has delivered the presents and filled the stockings. Help Santa eat the cookies before the kids wake up and discover him in this match 2 puzzle game. Build bigger sets to get extra time and lots of points

games.title: Kunenhrayenhnenh
games.author: Outgrabe
games.description: An encounter with the Kunenhrayenhnenh (Iroqouis floating head)

games.title: Kung Fu Escape
games.author: Anthony Clarke
games.description: Just a small little game trying to channel the old Kung Fu Master arcade game

games.title: l4arduboy
games.author: Amamoriya Yomogimaru
games.description: i4arduboy is a horizontal shmup. Control a submarine and snipe far enemies on off-screen with torpedos! This is a porting from our windows work i-20000.

games.title: Lasers
games.author: obono
games.description: A simple Ikaruga-like game

games.title: LATE
games.author: Vladimir Borisov
games.description: Little Arduboy Timekiller Endeavour - a puzzle game for fun and killing time. Features 3 modes - a tetris clone, a 1010! clone and a Stick Hero clone.

games.title: Leanna the Lion
games.author: shdwwzrd
games.description: I may be a lion, but I know what I like: I want fresh meat from my favorite restaurant. The zoo had to close

games.title: Light Meter
games.author: MLXXXp
games.description: This sketch turns an Arduboy miniature game system into a crude light meter by using the red LED of the RGB LED as a sensor

games.title: Lion
games.author: Press Play on Tape, Filmote and Vampirics
games.description: A version so the Game and Watch classic.

games.title: Lite Out
games.author: K. M. Kroski
games.description: Lite/Out is a game where you have to turn off all of the lights, but every time you change a light, the surrounding lights change. The game consists of a 5-by-5 grid where some of the blocks are lit up. You'll complete the level when all of the blocks are not lit.

games.title: Little Rook Chess
games.author: olikraus
games.description: Little Rook Chess is a chess program with a graphics front end. It was Originally developed as a demo application for my graphics library, U8glib13. Little Rook Chess is now part of U8g229, the latest version of my graphics lib.

games.title: Lode Runner (Level 1 to 40)
games.author: Simon Holmes (filmote)
games.description: A version of the classic Apple ][ game Lode Runner. Your mission is to collect all of the gold pieces without being touched by a guard. Once all pieces are collected, make your way to the top of the screen and to the next level. To stop the guards, you can burn a hole in normal bricks to your left or right (with the A or B button) and they will fall in, revealing any gold they might have picked up along the way.

games.title: Lode Runner (Level 120 to 154)
games.author: Simon Holmes (filmote)
games.description: A version of the classic Apple ][ game Lode Runner. Your mission is to collect all of the gold pieces without being touched by a guard. Once all pieces are collected, make your way to the top of the screen and to the next level. To stop the guards, you can burn a hole in normal bricks to your left or right (with the A or B button) and they will fall in, revealing any gold they might have picked up along the way.

games.title: Lode Runner (Level 41 to 80)
games.author: Simon Holmes (filmote)
games.description: A version of the classic Apple ][ game Lode Runner. Your mission is to collect all of the gold pieces without being touched by a guard. Once all pieces are collected, make your way to the top of the screen and to the next level. To stop the guards, you can burn a hole in normal bricks to your left or right (with the A or B button) and they will fall in, revealing any gold they might have picked up along the way.

games.title: Lode Runner (Level 81 to 120)
games.author: Simon Holmes (filmote)
games.description: A version of the classic Apple ][ game Lode Runner. Your mission is to collect all of the gold pieces without being touched by a guard. Once all pieces are collected, make your way to the top of the screen and to the next level. To stop the guards, you can burn a hole in normal bricks to your left or right (with the A or B button) and they will fall in, revealing any gold they might have picked up along the way.

games.title: Logix (Game Jam 3)
games.author: Filmote (Simon Holmes)
games.description: Learn logic circuit constructs in this puzzle game.

games.title: Love Tester
games.author: Pharap
games.description: A homage to Gunpei Yokoi, and a ridiculous entry to the Arduboy not a game Jam

games.title: LoveRush
games.author: Stephane Cote (Vampirics)
games.description: A simple infinite shoot em up where you need to gather hearts to build-up your shields and shoot those angry faces rushing on you. You get an extra shield for every 15 hearts you gather. Speed goes up after a certain amount of points you make. What's your high score?

games.title: Magic 8 Arduball
games.author: GnobarEl
games.description: Just ask something and the arduino will predict the better answer for your question

games.title: MayQ
games.author: cobinee
games.description: Small RPG

games.title: MazezaM
games.author: Aster Greenblatt, Aaron Williams
games.description: MazezaM is a puzzle game that was created by Malcolm Tyrrell for the ZX Spectrum in 2002. The game was released under the GNU Public License (GPL) and has since been ported to approximately 30 different platforms including the Commodore 64, Super Nintendo, and Android under the (incorrect) name Rote. The game is similar to Sokoban since the player is able to push (and not pull) boxes. One difference is that the boxes can only be pushed horizontally, and any push causes all of the boxes in that particular row to be moved. Another difference is that the player is only trying to exit the level as opposed to putting the boxes in the correct locations.

games.title: Mazogs
games.author: Brian
games.description: A port of the ZX-81 maze adventure game.

games.title: Metalog
games.author: Baptiste Pouget (ogbaba)
games.description: A Logic simulator for the gamebuino (This game was adapted using the Gamebuino Library for Arduboy by akkera102)

games.title: MicroCheckers
games.author: Jezzamon
games.description: It's the standard game of checkers, also known as draughts.

games.title: MicroCity
games.author: James Howard
games.description: MicroCity is a city simulation game inspired by SimCity

games.title: MicroTank
games.author: hartmann1301
games.description: You start with a small tank and your goal is to get as deep as possilbe into enemy territory

games.title: MicroTD
games.author: drummyfish
games.description: Tower Defense for Arduboy

games.title: Millipe
games.author: Dreamer2345
games.description: A small Centipede Clone

games.title: Minesweeper
games.author: Pharap
games.description: Simple Minesweeper game, available in multiple languages.

games.title: Miss Snake
games.author: Daniele Olmisani
games.description: Yes! Another Snake Clone

games.title: MUGICGEN POCKET is
games.author: inajob
games.description: 8bit mugic generator for Arduboy

games.title: Multiplication Table Game
games.author: luxurydab
games.description: Game which helps to learn Multiplication Table for kids

games.title: Nanoseq
games.author: inajob
games.description: nano size sequencer for arduboy

games.title: Night Raid
games.author: Evan Barger
games.description: a Missile Command inspired game for Arduboy

games.title: Ninja Fuzzgrawth
games.author: Hundstrasse
games.description: The Fuzzgrawth is the best ninja, he must ninja jump, slash, and fight his way to the top of the fabled three towers... there he will find the 'things'... collect all three things to be the one who has done that!

games.title: Nohzdyve
games.author: Daniel C (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: Nohzdyve is a platform game that involves catching all the eyeballs while avoiding walls and jaws!

games.title: Nomis
games.author: ccaroon
games.description: A simple memory game similar to Simon(tm).

games.title: Not Just a Hat Rack
games.author: Hundstrasse
games.description: Not Just a Hat Rack is a fast paced platformer for the Arduboy inspired by titles such as Super Meat Boy and Super House of Dead Ninjas. The aim is to complete the 40 rapidfire levels in the shortest time... There is no pause button

games.title: NumberMind
games.author: Yoshi
games.description: Master Mind type game with numbers for the Arduboy

games.title: Oh Mummy
games.author: Matthew Vicaradge
games.description: A demake of the Amsoft "classic" of the same name.

games.title: Oh, You're Gunna Die
games.author: pixelplatforms
games.description: This is a Bomberman-type game, but with a few changes. You'll have 10 seconds to reach the door safely, but try not touching anything or you'll die!

games.title: Oil Panic
games.author: Press Play on Tape, Filmote and Vampirics
games.description: Inspired by the Game and Watch version.

games.title: OktaArduToken
games.author: Micah Silverman
games.description: This project turns an ArduBoy credit card size game machine into a TOTP token for use with the Okta Verify OTP service.

games.title: Omega Chase
games.author: Karl P. Williams
games.description: Omega Chase is an Arduboy port of the classic arcade style shooter game Omega Race. In this game, you control a spaceship and must navigate through an arena, shooting down enemy ships and avoiding obstacles.

games.title: Omega Horizon
games.author: shdwwzrd
games.description: The planet of Turnax has extensive mineral deposits of high value to the Interplanetary Allied Confederation (IPAC). Recent unanticipated attacks by primative species have proven damaging to mining operations. Your mission is to eliminate the primitive hierarchy in minimal time.

games.title: Orbs
games.author: Jay Moskowitz
games.description: Osmos inspired-Eat smaller Orbs to get larger before the larger ones eat you. Orbs bounce off walls. Missles break apart Orbs.

games.title: PAC-Tastic
games.author: Dragula96
games.description: Secure the point while avoiding the enemy

games.title: Paqman
games.author: yoda
games.description: Gobble all the dots in the maze and eat powerpills to catch the ghosts. Now with sound. (This game was adapted using the Gamebuino Library for Arduboy by akkera102)

games.title: Petit of the dead
games.author: cobinee
games.description: 3d shooter using raycasting. Kill 100 enemies to survive

games.title: Petitseq
games.author: inajob
games.description: petitseq is petit size sequencer for Arduboy

games.title: PI 24k
games.author: obono
games.description: You can see 24,576 digits of circular constant

games.title: Picovaders
games.author: boochow
games.description: picovaders is a space invaders-like shooting game for Arduboy.

games.title: Pipe Boy
games.author: Glitschen
games.description: PipeBoy is a fast-paced puzzle game for Arduboy, inspired by Pipe Mania. Build an efficient pipe network before the liquid starts flowing! Play solo or cooperate with a friend in the 2-player mode. Think fast, optimize your connections, and become the ultimate pipe master!

games.title: Pipes
games.author: Filmote
games.description: A version of the classic pipes game where you must lay pip between each pair of nodes without the pipes crossing each other. This version has puzzles ranging from 5 x 5 to 9 x 9.

games.title: Pocket Fighter
games.author: Wang Renxin (paladin-t)
games.description: Pocket Fighter is an FTG, you can compete with your Arduboy. The CPU will repeat your actions at previous level.

games.title: Pocket Othello
games.author: Wang Renxin (paladin-t)
games.description: Pocket Othello is an Othello game for the Arduboy in your pocket.

games.title: Pocket PDA
games.author: Wang Renxin (paladin-t)
games.description: Pocket PDA is an OS for the Arduboy with some useful utilities, which turns your Arduboy into a PDA.

games.title: Poitto
games.author: inajob
games.description: The rules are simple: You try to go to the door. Avoid enemies, use switch blocks, spring blocks, and so on

games.title: Pong
games.author: Taylor Hansen (CrazyGuy108)
games.description: A Pong clone for the Arduboy

games.title: PongHauKi
games.author: databhor
games.description: A simple chess known in China and a few other Asian countries. Move 1 of 2 pieces by turn. Who gets blocked loses game.

games.title: Poop Panic!
games.author: inajob
games.description: You keep the zoo clean!

games.title: Psi Colo
games.author: obono
games.description: This is a puzzle game with dice on the 5x7 grid field. Creating a group of adjacent dice with identical pips - the size of which must be at least the number of pips - causes those dice to slowly sink into the field before disappearing. Chain reactions are possible by adding additional dice to a sinking set. Exceptionally, to get rid of 'one pip' die, you have to move a 'one pip' die next to some disappearing dice. Then all of the 'one pip' dice will start to disappear.

games.title: Pyoro!
games.author: Karim
games.description: Port of Pyoro (known as Bird and Beans in the US)

games.title: Quadrastic
games.author: dragula96
games.description: Quadrastic a simple addicting game based off a favorite psp homebrew game called Squarez.

games.title: Quarto!
games.author: obono
games.description: Abstract strategy board game

games.title: Randocity
games.author: pmwasson
games.description: Arduboy large open-world procedurally generated city motorcycle game with 3 play modes

games.title: Ravine Despoiler
games.author: Ben Combee (@unwiredben)
games.description: A loose interpretation of Atari's arcade classic Canyon Bomber

games.title: Rayne the Rogue
games.author: shdwwzrd
games.description: As a child Rayne watched the rich from the streets of the village and burned with jealousy. After years and years of poverty an idea formed. Rayne has decided to sneak into the lairs of dragons and steel their treasures. Rayne need your help to navigate the dangerous caves and avoid the dragon's breath to become the wealthiest person in the village, but take heed, the further Rayne gets the more treacherous it will be.

games.title: Reversi
games.author: obono
games.description: A simple board game

games.title: Rick and Morty Game
games.author: Celine Binder (celinebins)
games.description: The most epic unofficial Rick and Morty game

games.title: Ring Puzzle
games.author: Skuratovich Sergey
games.description: Puzzle game using toroidal topology.

games.title: Road Trip
games.author: Press Play on Tape, Filmote and Vampirics
games.description: Inspired by Enduro.

games.title: RoboDodge
games.author: Gaveno (Gavin Atkin)
games.description: Here is RoboDodge! The game where you control your very own small robot as you dodge the barrage of incoming rockets!

games.title: Rogue
games.author: BlueMax
games.description: Ascii character based Rogue-like game. Get the amulet of Yender on the 26th floor underground to survive on the ground.

games.title: Roo Run
games.author: crait
games.description: The zoo had to close and now all the animals are trying to escape! Help the kangaroo run away from the animal control who's trying to catch him. Push A and B back and forth as fast as you can to run faster. This game was created for the first Arduboy Game Jam. ! Your high score will be recorded and saved.

games.title: Rooftop Rescue
games.author: Bert van't Veer
games.description: Rescue the civilians who are trapped on the roof of imploding buildings.

games.title: Roshambo
games.author: CDR_Xavier
games.description: The first executable. Arduboy or PC alike.

games.title: Row Farm
games.author: Glitschen
games.description: Match adorable farm animals in this mini puzzle game inspired by classic Columns!

games.title: SameGame - A famous tile-matching puzzle
games.author: obono
games.description: This game is played on a 10�20 rectangular field, initially filled with 5 kinds of blocks placed at random. By selecting a group of adjoining blocks of the same kind, a player may remove them from the field

games.title: SanSan
games.author: Chamekan (chame)
games.description: This is Son Son, Rygar inspired action game, but add some original ideas.

games.title: Santa's Happy Little Packer
games.author: eried
games.description: Santa needs help, he has a lot of gifts in weird layout and you need to fit them in his sleigh filling all the spaces.

games.title: Self destruct message
games.author: Mr. Blinky
games.description: This program will erase itself after viewing the secret message for 5 seconds.

games.title: Sensitive
games.author: spinal
games.description: Arduboy remake (demake?) of the C64 game Sensitive by Oliver Kirwa.

games.title: SetSystemEEPROM
games.author: Scott Allen (MLXXXp)
games.description: Manage an Arduboy's system EEPROM area: unit name, unit ID, boot logo options. Also can reset the entire system or user EEPROM areas.

games.title: SFCave
games.author: Slade1972
games.description: A port of Stephanie Mak's SFCave: This is a game I used to enjoy back in the Palm Pilot days. It's a really simple game, uses only a single pushbutton to control the action. You're 'flying' through a cave and you can only control your altitude - press the button to go up, release the button to go down. The object is not to crash into the ceiling or floor.

games.title: SFZ
games.author: cobinee
games.description: Tiny third person perspective shooter

games.title: Shattered Lands
games.author: Justin Davis
games.description: A multi-part RPG saga

games.title: Siege
games.author: shdwwzrd
games.description: The king needs your help to keep the Dark Lord's army from destroying the kingdom. The Wizards will arrive after the 5th day and the rest of our army will be back in 20 days. The king is counting on you to hold the wall. Hold strong, noble archer, HOLD STRONG!

games.title: SkateArdDie!
games.author: pixelplatforms
games.description: Just a little skateboarding game for the arduboy

games.title: Sketch-A-Sketch
games.author: ccaroon
games.description: Sketch-A-Sketch is a simple drawing program ala Etch-A-Sketch.

games.title: Snake
games.author: CDR_Xavier
games.description: The snake as it appears on your Nokia screen. Not eating apples.

games.title: Snake
games.author: Stu, Comstedt, FManga
games.description: A Snake game by Stu. Any other information on it seems to have bitrotted away completely. (This game was adapted using an adapted version of Marcus Comstedt's SoftVMS emulator for Arduboy by FManga)

games.title: snELk
games.author: WojciechKo (Wojciech Korzeniowski)
games.description: SnELk is clone of Snake from Nokia 3210 written in C++ on Arduboy

games.title: Solitaire
games.author: Andy O'Neill (aoneill)
games.description: Klondike solitaire (This game was adapted using the Gamebuino Library for Arduboy by akkera102)

games.title: Space Battle - Trench Run
games.author: Lucas Cardinali (lscardinali)
games.description: Trench Run is an Arcade game where you play as a rebel pilot on the Doom Sphere assault. You have to fight against Imperial fighters to reach the Exhaustion Port and deliver the shot that will ultimately destroy the battle station.

games.title: Space Cab
games.author: Stephane C (vampirics) and Simon Holmes (filmote)
games.description: An arcade game inspired a lot by Space Taxi that was released on the Commodore 64.

games.title: Space Fighter
games.author: Maicon Hieronymus (PolygonAndPixel)
games.description: A game similar to Stellar Impact but not as finished and nice as Stellar Impact.

games.title: Space Invaders
games.author: Rednuht
games.description: Another game by Rednuht. Assembly source, lore, VMS files, etc: http://jumpstation.co.uk/si/si.html

games.title: Space Knife
games.author: streetalchemist
games.description: Work In Progress of a Gradius-Like Shooter for the Arduboy gaming device.

games.title: Space Quarth
games.author: Schuemi
games.description: Space Quarth is a combination of a puzzle and a recreational game. Your task is to create a rectangle from different figures by adding cubes.

games.title: Square Nose
games.author: JuiceLizard
games.description: A Sonic demake

games.title: Squario
games.author: arduboychris
games.description: Here is is the jumping square man adventure you've all been looking for!

games.title: Squid Jump
games.author: PrimmR
games.description: A demake of the Squid Jump microgame from Splatoon

games.title: Stairs Sweep
games.author: obono
games.description: Falling block puzzle game, something like Pac-Attack

games.title: Star Honor
games.author: Wenceslao Villanueva Jr
games.description: Star Honor is a Roguelike space adventure where you are field promoted into the Captain's chair of the USS Arduino. Your home world has become the victim of the a biological weapon deployed by enemies. You posses the only hope for your world, a cure for the phage. With a skeleton crew, a limping vessel and time running out, you must travel world to world, seeing supplies, upgrades and doing battle to make it home and save your planet.

games.title: Starduino
games.author: Stephane Hockenhull
games.description: Defend your home planet in this endless rail shooter featuring true 3D graphics. Look out for the ever-increasing dangers as your score gets higher and higher.

games.title: Starduino Turbo
games.author: Stephane Hockenhull
games.description: Defend your home planet in this endless rail shooter featuring true 3D graphics. Look out for the ever-increasing dangers as your score gets higher and higher. (50% higher FPS version)

games.title: Stellar Impact
games.author: Nick Allen (gnargle)
games.description: It's a simple shmup, but it has lots of stuff I think is pretty neat, like procgen starfields, a bomb that freezes time, a nice title screen, eeprom saving and more.

games.title: Sudoku-NBP
games.author: neilsunw
games.description: Play Sudoku on your Arduboy. Includes 45 puzzles (easy, medium, hard) and allows custom puzzles to be entered manually or via serial input. Four players or puzzles can be save and restored from non-volatile memory (EEPROM).

games.title: Super Crate Buino
games.author: Aurélien Rodot (ported by uXe)
games.description: A platform-action-shooting game from the Gamebuino

games.title: Super Soldiers
games.author: David Inwood
games.description: A dragon is attempting to conquer Canada by sending monsters after all of its cities. The military responds by sending its elite super soldiers powered by ancient gems to fight them.

games.title: Tackle Box
games.author: Matt
games.description: A fishing adventure

games.title: Tamaguino-AB
games.author: Alojz Jakob (Port by KeyboardCamper)
games.description: A port of Alojz Jakob’s Tamaguino for the Arduboy Games System

games.title: Techno Monkey
games.author: RetrobitCoder
games.description:
A meteor crashes in a zoo during the night.

An alien virus spreads to the residents in the zoo and causes them to mutate into
robot hybrids called Technoids.

Do to the outbreak, the zoo has been under quarantine.

It is a fight for survival inside.
Can you beat the opposing Technoids and survive?

games.title: Tetris
games.author: Comstedt, FManga
games.description: By Marcus Comstedt. After he wrote the assembler and reverse-engineered the hardware, he released this as a tutorial on making games for the VMU (This game was adapted using an adapted version of Marcus Comstedt's SoftVMS emulator for Arduboy by FManga)

games.title: Tetroi
games.author: Roger Buehler
games.description: An Arduboy clone of a very well known and successful game from the 80s

games.title: The Bounce
games.author: Joshimuz
games.description: The Bounce is a bouncy ball physics platformer game. Simple to understand yet incredibly hard to master, what seems easy at first glance is actually pretty rage inducing when you get to the later levels. I'm not much of an artist so I focused on simple design, which allows for easily customisable levels (maybe a level editor someday) and awesome gameplay.

games.title: The Curse of Astarok
games.author: Press Play on Tape
games.description: A push your luck Dungeon Crawl game where you need to release your town from the curse of AztaroK

games.title: The guy who never complains
games.author: JuiceLizard
games.description:
A funny ebook on Arduboy.

The guy who never complains by Juice Lizard, 2016-2017. 32 chapters, 15 minutes of pure positive attitude.

A: next page B: previous page

games.title: The Quest for Truth
games.author: Timmy O' Toole
games.description: It is a platformer game with elements of RPG and puzzle-solving challenges.

games.title: The Social Distance Game
games.author: msanatan
games.description: Keep out of people's way as long as you can!

games.title: TheQuestForTruth
games.author: Timmy O'Toole
games.description: Platformer with RPG and puzzle solving elements

games.title: TicTacCurly
games.author: curly
games.description: tic tac toe game for arduboy 1-2 player

games.title: TiMiNoo
games.author: TME520
games.description: Cute 1 bit VPet for Arduboy - Feed, cuddle, clean and educate your own unique cat

games.title: Tiny Asteroids
games.author: akkera102
games.description: Asteroids(1979) clone.

games.title: Tiny Depth
games.author: akkera102
games.description: tiny depth is SuperDepth(1991) stage1 clone.

games.title: Tiny Digital Invader
games.author: akkera102
games.description: Tiny Digital Invader is Casio MG-880 Calculator(1980) game clone. This game use only 8 * 7-segment display.

games.title: Tiny NS-Tower
games.author: akkera102
games.description: player climb tower. goal is 30 floor.

games.title: Tiny Sokoban
games.author: akkera102
games.description: Tiny Sokoban is Sokoban(1982) clone. It use Yoshio Murase Levels. These levels are very small (no more than 8x8). But difficult and interesting.

games.title: Tiny-Bert
games.author: Daniel Champagne (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: Tiny_Bert (like Q-Bert)

games.title: Tiny-Bike v1.2
games.author: Daniel Champagne (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: Tiny_Bike v1.2 (like excite bike)

games.title: Tiny-DDug
games.author: Daniel C (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: Tiny-DDug (like Dig Dug on atari 2600)

games.title: Tiny-Doc
games.author: Daniel C (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: Tiny-Doc is a puzzle game inspired by the popular GameBoy game Dr. Mario. Tiny-Doc was originally created for the Tinyjoypad based on the Attiny85.

games.title: Tiny-Missile
games.author: Daniel C (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: Tiny-Missile (like Missile Command on atari 2600)

games.title: Tiny-Morpion
games.author: Daniel C (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: Tiny-Morpion (tic-tac-toe)

games.title: Tiny-Pipe
games.author: Daniel C (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: Tiny-Pipe (like Pipeline atari 2600)

games.title: Tiny-Plaque
games.author: Daniel C (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: Tiny-Plaque (like Plaque attack atari 2600)

games.title: Tiny-SQuest
games.author: Daniel C (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: Tiny-SQuest (like SeaQuest atari 2600)

games.title: Tiny-Trick
games.author: Daniel Champagne (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: Tiny-Trick (like Hat Trick c64)

games.title: Tiny-Tris
games.author: Daniel C (Electro L.I.B)
games.description: Tiny-Tris (like tetris classic)

games.title: TinyDungeon
games.author: Lorandil
games.description: TinyDungeon is an old school dungeon crawler (inspired by the games of the 80s like "The Bards Tale" or "Dungeon Master"). The goal of the game is to find the Water of Life to save your love from a mysterious desease. The fountain is rumored to be in the depth of a dark and creepy dungeon... (I'm working on a more elaborate version of the story ;P) The dungeon contains some nasty things like teleporters and spinners, so it is strongly recommended to draw a map. Oh, there are monsters, too! ;)

games.title: To
games.author: waday
games.description: You are the developer of the door with the teleport function. But just before completion, someone is trying to destroy the door. There seems to be no choice but to distort the space with the power of the door and to prevent destruction.

games.title: Toyoshiki Tiny Basic
games.author: akkera102
games.description: Toyoshiki Tiny Basic is a Tiny BASIC interpreter that receives input from a serial device connected via USB. Note that a serial monitor program, such as Tera Term, is required to use this application.

games.title: Train Dodge
games.author: crait
games.description: Who's brave enough to play chicken with a train? Stand on the track as multiple trains come at you full-speed... The closer they get to you before jumping off the tracks, the more points you'll rack up. (You'll also lose points for jumping off of the track too early.) Dodge as many as you can, but beware! If you don't jump off in time, you'll be hit!

games.title: Tres
games.author: Casey Gold (cajogold)
games.description: Clone/Port/Rip-off of the game Threes! for mobile phones

games.title: Tris
games.author: Yuki
games.description: Like Tetris, but not copyrighted

games.title: TTyGO
games.author: Innovation Garage
games.description: VT220 serial terminal for Arduino

games.title: Turtle Bridge
games.author: Filmote and Vampirics
games.description: A version of the classic Game and Watch game, Turtle Bridge!

games.title: TV Tuner
games.author: Paul Wasson
games.description: Software defined NTSC TV tuner

games.title: Twotris
games.author: Cédric Martin
games.description: A version of the classic Tetris, but for two players. Two buttons each for the controls: move, or turn

games.title: Ufo-Race
games.author: rodot
games.description: A fast paced racing game where you have to finish a lap as fast as possible while avoiding obstacles. (This game was adapted using the Gamebuino Library for Arduboy by akkera102)

games.title: Umeroose
games.author: cobinee
games.description: Super simple game. Fill the holes and do not fall

games.title: Under the Tower
games.author: wuuff
games.description: In a dying city, cut off from the world due to plague, the Tower stands above its center. While the rich and powerful gather in the tower, safe from the devastation below, those below are not so lucky. Among the trash on mud flats by the river, scavengers seek to find anything valuable. They are known as Mudlarks. This is the tale of one of the many unfortunate souls that lives Under the Tower.

games.title: Unicorn Dash
games.author: Kirill Korolkov
games.description: A simple unicorn themed endless runner

games.title: Virtual Gamepad
games.author: eried
games.description: Simple USB HID Gamepad. Emulates a normal gamepad with 4 buttons and directional pad.

games.title: Waternet
games.author: Willems Davy aka Joyrider3774
games.description: A puzzle game based on the Net and Netslide games from Simon Tatham's puzzle collection.

games.title: WHG
games.author: sorunome
games.description: This is a Gamebuino port of the browsergame Worlds Hardest Game. Featuring 22 levels this game will surely seem to be next to impossible! I am not responsible for any damage to your Gamebuino that you do due to the frustration when trying to beat this game. (This game was adapted using the Gamebuino Library for Arduboy by akkera102)

games.title: Wire Screensaver
games.author: blockbird
games.description: Simple demo showing a Morie type pattern thing.

games.title: Yatzy
games.author: shdwwzrd
games.description: The classic dice game is now available for the ARDUBOY! Play Solo or play with up to two friends with pass and play.

games.title: YouWontSurvive
games.author: Andre Hellwig (AstroAndre)
games.description: Avoid incoming enemies on two different modes and test your reflexes. Move your character by pressing UP and DOWN. Sounds easy right? But remember ...surviving is hard in this one. Get at least 30 points! Good luck and happy gaming!

games.title: Zoo
games.author: Yuki
games.description: ZooKeeper Clone

games.title: Zoo at Midnight
games.author: Hundstrasse
games.description: The zoo had to close, but the keepers had forgotten to feed the animals, now it's up to Scrawf to find them food and feed them without being caught in the zoo warden's flashlights! Guide Scrawf through, what can only be described as, the world's most warden heavy zoo and hedge-maze. Slip past the wardens and avoid their flashlights to find the three different types of food to feed the Lion, Zebra, and Elephant. Finally, once all the animals are fed and sleepy, escape from the zoo!

games.title: ZooEscape
games.author: FerJerez
games.description: Entry for the Arduboy Jam May 2017. Instructions: Escape from animals as long as you can. Jump over Crocodile. Run when Rhino charges. Jump the small animals on the ground.
